response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed to identify the song title "Glitter Love" from on-screen text shown during the performance and in the promotional thumbnail at the end. A list of performers was extracted from the scrolling credits, including Omaru Polka, AZKi, and others. A web search was conducted for the lyrics, but no direct results for an "official" version were found, likely because it is a new original song for the event. Therefore, lyrics are set to null.
response.global_summary: A virtual live performance by Hololive members of the original song "Glitter Love". The video includes extensive on-screen credits for the cast, choreography, and production.

scenes.description: Hololive members perform the song 'Glitter Love' on a stage with a checkered floor, with their avatars displayed on a large screen in the background. Scrolling text credits the cast and production team.
scenes.performer_in_video: Omaru Polka and various Hololive members
